title: What is the ‘Thucydides Trap’? Why Xi Jinping brought it up during talks with Donald Trump in Beijing
summary_full: Chinese President Xi Jinping invoked the "Thucydides Trap" during talks with US President Donald Trump, highlighting concerns that the rising power's growth could lead to conflict with the established dominant power. This theory, popularized by Graham Allison, suggests structural tensions make war more likely, a concept now central to global geopolitical debates involving trade wars and technological competition.
